name: jdAuthorAgent
title: JD Author Agent
description: 订阅 HIRING_REQUIREMENT_SUBMITTED。加载 jd-authoring 技能,把招聘需求转写成中文 JD,持久化到 data/jd-archive/<tenant>/,emit JD_DRAFTED 带 jdId + jdPath + jd_text 供下游 agent 使用。

tool_use.name: writeJdToDisk
tool_use.description: Persist the authored JD to data/jd-archive/<tenant>/<jdId>.md.

tool_use.name: parseJdApi
tool_use.description: Optional: RoboHire /api/v1/parse-jd to structure the JD.

actions.name: authorJD
actions.description: Draft a Chinese JD from the requirements payload, persist, emit JD_DRAFTED.

name: resumeIntakeAgent
title: Resume Intake Agent
description: 订阅 RESUME_INTAKE_REQUESTED。从 data/resumes/<tenant>/inbox/<filename> 读取 PDF/文本简历,调用 RoboHire parseResumeApi 结构化候选人数据,emit RESUME_PARSED 带 candidate_name + parsed_resume + jr_id + jd_text 供 batchMatchAgent 直接消费。

tool_use.name: readResumeFromDisk
tool_use.description: Read the resume file from the tenant inbox folder. REQUIRES {filename}. Returns {filename, mime, base64, sha256, bytes, path}.

tool_use.name: parseResumeApi
tool_use.description: RoboHire POST /api/v1/parse-resume — accepts {resume_base64} (with mime hint), {resume_url}, or {resume_text}. Returns structured candidate data.

actions.name: intakeAndParseResume
actions.description: Read the resume file from the inbox, parse it via RoboHire, emit RESUME_PARSED with structured candidate data and pass-through JD context.

name: batchMatchAgent
title: Batch Match Agent
description: 订阅 CANDIDATE_BATCH_SUBMITTED 和 RESUME_PARSED。加载 match-rubric 技能,对每位候选人调用 RoboHire matchResumeApi,按阈值映射决策标签,emit BATCH_MATCH_COMPLETED 带排序后的 matches 数组。RESUME_PARSED 视为单候选人批次。

tool_use.name: skills.load_skill
tool_use.description: Load 'match-rubric' for the score → decision matrix.

tool_use.name: matchResumeApi
tool_use.description: RoboHire POST /api/v1/match-resume — REQUIRES {resume, jd}. Returns normalized {matchScore, verdict, hiringRecommendation, summary, raw}.

actions.name: batchMatchResumes
actions.description: Loop the candidates array, call matchResumeApi for each, rank by matchScore, emit ranked BATCH_MATCH_COMPLETED. When the trigger is RESUME_PARSED, treat as a 1-candidate batch.

name: reportAgent
title: Report Agent
description: 订阅 BATCH_MATCH_COMPLETED。加载 report-template 技能,组装完整的中文 HTML 招聘漏斗报告,持久化到 data/reports/<tenant>/,emit REPORT_GENERATED 带文件路径。

tool_use.name: writeReportToDisk
tool_use.description: Persist the assembled HTML to data/reports/<tenant>/<reportId>.html.

actions.name: buildReport
actions.description: Assemble the full HTML report from the ranked matches array, persist, emit REPORT_GENERATED.
